title: Origins: Petripod
description: Adds the Petripod to Origins Minecraft!
body:
**Requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) for Minecraft 1.20.2/1.20.1**

**Note: You have to add the datapack manually to your world if you are intending to add it with the modrinth app.**

**Origin Impact: 3**

_Dismal, gloomy squid-like beings that soar the troposphere in search of condensed vapor. Petripoda soak up liquids to discharge strategically whether for traversal, or defense._

# Powers

<details>
<summary>Tropulsion</summary>
You operate your assemblage of squidgy tendrils to push air behind you as you glide through the earth's vast canopy. 
  
> You can move through air, as if swimming in water. Additionally, your mining speed is increased while airborne.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Cloud Storage</summary>
You absorb spatters of water from your setting, sewing it together into a condensed shape.
  
> Hold the primary ability key in water, rain, in a cauldron, or when above Y=193 to fill your storage.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Altitude Amenity</summary>
The endless skyline supplements you with bliss and moisture, threading your form with nourishment.
  
> As long as you're above Y=193, you get fed overtime and your abilities consume less moisture.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Vapor Plane</summary>
You expel your stored liquid into a concentrated jet behind you, flooding your hazy interior with swelling pressure that drives you forward.
  
> By pressing the secondary ability key while sprinting, you propel yourself forward at the cost of some water.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Drip Shot</summary>
Your interior floods with swelling pressure, then firing a sharp, potent spritz of condensed vapor
  
> Press the secondary ability key while not sprinting, to shoot a water projectile that deals 4 armor-piercing damage, consuming water.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Aqua Vitae</summary>
H2O flows through your cottony innards and supplies your very essence.
  
> If fully dehydrated, you start to take damage, dissipating.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Certified Leak</summary>
If enduring visceral trauma, or exposed to the harsh rays of the star above, water seeps through the gloomy walls of your somber shell.
  
> Taking damage, or being in hot biomes causes you to leak water.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Nimbus Dreams</summary>
The serene atmosphere of the sky is too soothing to pass up on.
  
> You refuse to sleep below Y-level 100 due to uncomfortable conditions.
</details>
